programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry volunteers to help at the 24-hour Famine event to spend time with Eva MacPhee.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry tries to match Dwyer in positive reviews on a website; Simon stands up to a student.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry thinks he will catch students cheating during exam week.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mary takes a course but is mistaken for the instructor; Mike Sr. and Pop take an emotional train ride.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark joins the Peace A Chord concert but takes the spotlight; the Fox family struggles with Susanne's engagement; Mary seeks support while Ritche struggles to earn his father's approval.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When school is cancelled, Mark spends the day with Pop touring St. John's; Mary enters the Miss Mall pageant, and Dick crashes Mike Jr.'s dinner with Amanda's mom.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Fox volunteers Paul's house for a chaotic party, while Mark struggles to keep order; Mike Jr., Dick, and Amanda drive the Party Wagon, and Mary juggles tasks for her internship.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.sub-title: For the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: Mark's sketch show gets its big break the same night as Fox's mom's wedding; Mary organizes it, and Fox finds the courage to give a speech; Mike Sr. confronts Pop over a health concern.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma tries to hide the fact that she lost something valuable; Jung threatens to ruin Janet's chance with a yoga instructor; Shannon and Kimchee win a BBQ.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma are at odds over a wedding dress, while Shannon and Jung struggle with cultural sensitivities after a visit to a burger joint; Janet grapples with the fallout of Raj's canceled engagement and faces an awkward night out with Nathan.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: While Appa is reluctant to have a houseguest, Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor; Jung accuses Janet of being cold-hearted; Shannon tackles an office bullying problem.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet; Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess; Shannon is finally single, but Jung is unsure if he will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Jung and Shannon try to hide their relationship from the rest of the Handy gang, but their cover may be blown after Shannon gets a little "handy" at a staff meeting.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet considers getting a new tattoo; Jung and Shannon exchange "five-week-iversary" gifts; Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry adopts Dwyer's diet and decides the whole school should suffer with him.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry turns to online dating with Bobbi and Robert's big day fast approaching.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: An under-qualified teacher tries to fake his way through his career.

programme.desc: Gerry volunteers to help at the 24-hour Famine event to spend time with Eva MacPhee.

programme.desc: Gerry tries to match Dwyer in positive reviews on a website; Simon stands up to a student.

programme.desc: Gerry adopts Dwyer's diet and decides the whole school should suffer with him.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry turns to online dating with Bobbi and Robert's big day fast approaching.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: A text mishap derails Shannon's Gran-Paws shelter visit; Kristian is forced to un-book a special day off.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.desc: It's an upside-down world for women; legal ramifications of the scrunchie; is it peri-menopause?

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Hosted by Lauren Ash with performances by James O'Hara, Faris Hytiaa, Clare Belford, Ryan Maglunob, Callum O'Neill and Zabrina Douglas.

programme.title: Comedy Night With Rick Mercer
programme.desc: Stand-up performance by Eman El-Husseini.

programme.title: Comedy Night With Rick Mercer
programme.desc: Comedian and TV icon Rick Mercer is joined by Canadian comics Ted Morris, Mark Forward, Tranna Wintour, and Erica Sigurdson.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: Two fathers reveal an adoption bombshell; the TallBoyz await news about an audition; a traveler encounters a bathroom attendant in an unlikely spot.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.sub-title: Suck It Up And Go To Mars
programme.desc: A jaded detective uses unorthodox methods to solve crimes; the TallBoyz have doubts about their trip to Mars; friends visit their old high school and make an awful discovery.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While in town for the surprise party, Patrick's parents get a surprise of their own; Moira gets coaxed into going to a soap opera convention with Alexis.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny fills in at the annual mayor's roast; David tries to stop Moira from finding out about Stevie and Patrick's dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Patrick and David go on a romantic hike; everyone panics over Johnny's health scare.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Stevie is nowhere to be found on opening night for Cabaret; David attempts to make a big announcement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Suspicious of Nathan Jr.'s behavior, Kate looks to Anne for advice, but the guidance she needs comes from a surprising source; a promising book proposal reunites rivals Kate and Sloane.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Jenny and MCP face the consequences of mixing business with pleasure; Kate makes a tough choice at work; there's a bumpy legal road ahead for Lionel.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Val invites her friends to plan her birthday; a conflict causes the party to go off the rails until Sloane turns things around.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate urges Nathan Jr. to loosen up and discover his wild side; MCP tries to solve problems the quick way, but Jenny isn't willing to cut corners; Anne struggles to keep her trademark anger in check.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate plays detective after finding a mysterious phone number in Nathan's pocket; Anne's explosive personality lands her in anger management; Sloane's ultrasound appointment goes a little too well.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate helps Nathan build a connection with Nathan Jr; Anne joins Lionel in Cochrane to support his big day in court; Jenny feels edged out of her own wedding planning while Sloane's love life heats up.

programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: While Julie's libido flatlines, Kris is hit with a wave of perimenopausal horniness and can't focus on anything but sex, leading them to visit a sex shop for research.
